# GitHub Copilot Instructions

This repository contains a static HTML/CSS/JavaScript AI recruitment dashboard application.

## General Guidelines

- This is a single-page application with no build process
- All code is contained in `index.html` with embedded CSS and JavaScript
- Follow modern web standards and best practices
- Maintain clean, readable, and well-commented code

## Code Style

### HTML
- Use semantic HTML5 elements
- Maintain consistent indentation (4 spaces)
- Include appropriate ARIA attributes for accessibility
- Keep the structure organized and logical

### CSS
- Use CSS custom properties (CSS variables) for theming
- Follow the existing naming conventions
- Maintain the current color scheme defined in `:root`
- Use flexbox and grid for layouts
- Ensure responsive design principles are followed

### JavaScript
- Use modern ES6+ syntax
- Write clear, descriptive variable and function names
- Add comments for complex logic
- Handle errors gracefully
- Ensure all interactive elements have appropriate event listeners

## Project Structure

- `index.html` - Main application file containing HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
- `README.md` - Project documentation

## Best Practices

- Test all changes in a browser before committing
- Ensure cross-browser compatibility
- Maintain accessibility standards (WCAG 2.1)
- Keep the dashboard responsive for mobile, tablet, and desktop views
- Preserve the existing visual design and branding
- Validate HTML, CSS, and JavaScript syntax

## Areas to Focus

- User interface improvements
- Accessibility enhancements
- Code organization and readability
- Bug fixes and error handling
- Performance optimizations

## Areas to Avoid

- Do not introduce external dependencies or build tools unless absolutely necessary
- Do not modify the core functionality without clear requirements
- Do not change the overall design aesthetic without approval
